entry.title: News
entry.summary: 2024-10-1: Our paper "Simplified POMDP Planning with an Alternative Observation Space and Formal Performance Guarantees" has been accepted to ISRR 2024.
entry.content:
2024-10-1: Our paper "Simplified POMDP Planning with an Alternative Observation Space and Formal Performance Guarantees" has been accepted to ISRR 2024.

2023-5-25: I will join the ANPL lab at Technion - Israel Institute of Technology.

entry.title: Da Kong 孔达
entry.summary: Hey! My name is Da Kong. I am now a PhD student in the ANPL lab at Technion, supervised by Prof. Vadim Indelman).
entry.content:
Hey! My name is Da Kong. I am now a PhD student in the ANPL lab at Technion, supervised by Prof. Vadim Indelman).

My research interest focuses on robotics navigation and SLAM. I am working on active SLAM, POMDP, and belief space planning.

I used to study in the Intelligent Autonomous System Lab at Zhejiang University, supervised by Prof. Yu Zhang. I also worked closely with Dr. Weichen Dai, now at Hangzhou Dianzi University.
